# Let's check where the test mod starts
grep -n "mod tests\|#\[cfg(test)\]" src/rank.rs

python3 - <<'EOF'
import re

functions = [
    ("rank", 101),
    ("apply_blast_radius", 109),
    ("rank_with_config", 145),
    ("build_name_index", 173),
    ("build_file_edges", 191),
    ("pagerank", 217),
    ("compute_blast", 284),
    ("transitive_caller_count", 319),
]

# Top-level closing braces (from grep above, excluding test mod which starts at 354)
top_level_closes = [58, 66, 76, 86, 97, 103, 116, 129, 143, 168, 187, 213, 279, 314, 352]

for name, start in functions:
    # Find the first top-level close brace after start
    end = next((c for c in top_level_closes if c >= start), None)
    span = end - start + 1 if end else None
    print(f"{name}: start={start}, end={end}, span={span}")
EOF
